_note: Dev-time seed data for populating the 'Ingredient' metaobject in Shopify admin (Content > Metaobjects). Once those entries exist, THEY are the source of truth — sections should reference them via metaobject_list dynamic sources, not this file. Keep this file only as a reference/backup for reseeding.

ingredients.name: Tamarind Seed Extract
ingredients.whatItIs: A natural polysaccharide extracted from tamarind seeds.
ingredients.whyWeChoseIt: Forms part of the proprietary Tamarinse™ fiber matrix.
researchOrgs: The University of Texas at Dallas

ingredients.name: Okra Polysaccharides
ingredients.whatItIs: A soluble plant polysaccharide naturally found in okra.
ingredients.whyWeChoseIt: Supports formation of a viscous fiber matrix.
researchOrgs: The University of Texas at Dallas

ingredients.name: Fenugreek Extract
ingredients.whatItIs: A source of soluble galactomannan polysaccharides.
researchOrgs: The University of Texas at Dallas
National Institutes of Health (NIH) Natural Products Research Program

ingredients.name: Activated Coconut Charcoal
ingredients.whatItIs: An ultra-porous activated carbon derived from coconut shells.
ingredients.whyWeChoseIt: Provides additional adsorption capacity within the digestive tract.
researchOrgs: European Association of Poisons Centres and Clinical Toxicologists (EAPCCT)
University of Tennessee Health Science Center

ingredients.name: Organic Chlorella
ingredients.whyWeChoseIt: Supports antioxidant defenses and normal detoxification pathways.
researchOrgs: National Center for Complementary and Integrative Health (NCCIH)

ingredients.name: Milk Thistle Extract
ingredients.whyWeChoseIt: Supports healthy liver function and antioxidant activity.
researchOrgs: National Center for Complementary and Integrative Health (NCCIH)

featuredResearchOrgs: National Center for Complementary and Integrative Health (NCCIH)
The University of Texas at Dallas
